groups.title: Dark Mode Support
entries: Added full dark/light theme toggle with view-transition circle animation across the entire landing page.
All sections (Hero, ComponentBrowser, Testimonials, CTA, Footer) now seamlessly adapt to dark mode.
Preview cards use theme-aware backgrounds so component previews render their own dark styles correctly.

groups.title: FAQ & Changelog
entries: Added animated FAQ accordion section with smooth expand/collapse on the landing page.
Added changelog page with timeline layout for tracking all updates.
Added What's New preview section on the landing page with live data from changelog.

groups.title: Text Animations
entries: Added Vapor Smoke Text — cinematic smoke-dissolve text effect with spring physics.
Added Magnetic Scatter Text — hover-triggered scatter animation with deterministic randomness.
Added Word Magnet — physics-based word repulsion on cursor proximity.
Added Sound Text — interactive text that plays pentatonic scale notes on letter hover.

groups.title: Premium Buttons
entries: Added Glass Shimmer Button — premium glassmorphism button with animated shimmer highlight.
Added Retro Pixel Button — 8-bit style button with pixel-perfect press animation.
Added Neumorphism 3D Button — soft UI button with realistic depth and press feedback.

groups.title: Improvements
entries: Refined Liquid Button spring physics for more natural bounce on hover.

groups.title: Interactive Backgrounds & 3D
entries: Added Liquid Wave — canvas-based dynamic wave animation for hero sections.
Added Liquid Metal — WebGL metallic fluid effect with customizable text overlay.
Added 3D Interactive Book — perspective-tracking 3D book element with page flip animations.

groups.title: Core Components
entries: Liquid Button — flagship morphing button with fluid motion transitions.
Crystal Soft Button — soft UI button with subtle glow effects.
Loading Spinner — elegant spinner with gradient text shimmer animation.
Glass Search Bar — glassmorphism search with keyboard navigation and command palette shortcut.

groups.title: Developer Experience
entries: Shipped CLI tool for one-command installation: npx rareui add [component-name].
Full documentation site with copy-paste code blocks and live previews.
